paragraphs: I started my career in software in 2022 with a hundred-day commitment to learn programming. What began as an experiment quickly became a profession. Programming combined everything I enjoyed: problem-solving, systems thinking, and the ability to build things from first principles.

Since then, I have worked across startups and fintech, building payment systems, merchant platforms, internal AI tools, and distributed backend services. My work has ranged from recurring payments and financial infrastructure at scale to developer tooling, cloud systems, and applied AI.
Today, I enjoy building reliable systems, understanding how complex software behaves in production, and turning difficult problems into simple, maintainable solutions.
about.photoHold: this photo took about forty attempts. the code takes less.
